safe_local_capabilities: scan and summarize the whole repository
coordinate all registered bots through Buddy
generate readiness, capability, source-fusion, cost, storage, and revenue-practice reports
prepare app, website, game, course, simulation, workflow, API, webhook, image, voice, and bot-builder packets
prepare safe commits and pull request packets
create repair plans for failed checks
store only useful reports, test evidence, approvals, and reusable fix recipes

free_tests.name: Laptop setup verification
free_tests.proves: Buddy can validate local setup, safety policy, autonomy config, bot readiness, and smoke tests.

free_tests.name: Quick free sweep
free_tests.proves: Buddy can run low-cost reports and checks without cloud minutes.

free_tests.name: Autonomous everything catalog
free_tests.proves: Every connected bot/division is represented in the governed autonomy queue.

free_tests.name: Generated bot smoke tests
free_tests.proves: Generated bot contracts can be discovered and smoke-tested locally.

free_tests.name: Dashboard TypeScript check
free_tests.proves: The dashboard code compiles with the bundled local runtime.

free_tests.name: Open local dashboard
free_tests.proves: Buddy can be tested through the local app without deploying.

mission: Make Buddy testable in free/local-first mode before using paid services or live account actions.
paid_or_live_blocks: customer charges, refunds, payouts, or transfers
granting repository, cloud, payment, email, or social access
sending outreach, calls, messages, proposals, bids, or social posts
